creator: bcran@FreeBSD.org
text: mount(8) has a section on the snapshot command. At the end it says more information can be found in /usr/src/sys/ufs/ffs/README.snapshot.  Unfortunately the first paragraph in README.snapshot hasn't been updated since 2000 and still refers to snapshots as alpha-test code.  This needs to be updated since snapshot capability is stable in modern releases of FreeBSD.
